restoreTarget: restore-test host or temporary database name
restoreMethod: Restored database dump into an isolated target and verified app health plus sample records.

checks.name: backup_file_present
checks.detail: Backup file exists outside the running container.

checks.name: database_restore
checks.detail: Database restored into an isolated target without errors.

checks.name: health_after_restore
checks.detail: Restored app health endpoint returned status ok.

checks.name: sample_workspace_records
checks.detail: Sample tenant, users, tickets, comments, and attachments were readable.

notes: Replace this template with real dated restore evidence before production deploy completion.
